text.tspan: AoS vs SoA Memory Layout Analysis
Cache Line Utilization & GPU Memory Coalescing

ul.li: Locality: Spatial locality is poor for attribute-specific kernels.
Fetching: Loading x forces the fetch of vx, vy, vz, r, g, b, mass into cache.

text.tspan: Stride: 40B | Cache Waste: 90% (when only x is needed)
CPU must fetch entire struct for one field.

ul.li: Locality: Perfect spatial locality for streaming kernels.
GPU: Enables Memory Coalescing (Single Instruction Multiple Threads).

text.tspan: 16 particles processed per cache line load.
